test.ts(7,7): error TS2322: Type 'import("b/outer").Outer' is not assignable to type 'import("a/outer").Outer'.
  Types of property 'inners' are incompatible.
    Type 'import("b/inner").Inner[]' is not assignable to type 'import("a/inner").Inner[]'.
      Type 'import("b/inner").Inner' is not assignable to type 'import("a/inner").Inner'.
        Types of property 'mids' are incompatible.
          Type 'import("b/leaf").Mid[]' is not assignable to type 'import("a/leaf").Mid[]'.
            Type 'import("b/leaf").Mid' is not assignable to type 'import("a/leaf").Mid'.
              Types of property 'leaves' are incompatible.
                Type 'import("b/leaf").Leaf[]' is not assignable to type 'import("a/leaf").Leaf[]'.
                  Property 'id' is missing in type 'import("b/leaf").Leaf' but required in type 'import("a/leaf").Leaf'.


==== test.ts (1 errors) ====
    import type { Outer as Target } from "./a/outer";
    import type { Outer as Source } from "./b/outer";
    
    // Should error: b/leaf.ts Leaf is missing 'id' required by a/leaf.ts Leaf.
    // tsc reports this. tsgo misses it when types are nested 3+ import levels deep with arrays.
    declare function getSource(): Source;
    const target: Target = getSource();
          ~~~~~~
!!! error TS2322: Type 'import("b/outer").Outer' is not assignable to type 'import("a/outer").Outer'.
!!! error TS2322:   Types of property 'inners' are incompatible.
!!! error TS2322:     Type 'import("b/inner").Inner[]' is not assignable to type 'import("a/inner").Inner[]'.
!!! error TS2322:       Type 'import("b/inner").Inner' is not assignable to type 'import("a/inner").Inner'.
!!! error TS2322:         Types of property 'mids' are incompatible.
!!! error TS2322:           Type 'import("b/leaf").Mid[]' is not assignable to type 'import("a/leaf").Mid[]'.
!!! error TS2322:             Type 'import("b/leaf").Mid' is not assignable to type 'import("a/leaf").Mid'.
!!! error TS2322:               Types of property 'leaves' are incompatible.
!!! error TS2322:                 Type 'import("b/leaf").Leaf[]' is not assignable to type 'import("a/leaf").Leaf[]'.
!!! error TS2322:                   Property 'id' is missing in type 'import("b/leaf").Leaf' but required in type 'import("a/leaf").Leaf'.
!!! related TS2728 a/leaf.ts:2:3: 'id' is declared here.
    
==== a/outer.ts (0 errors) ====
    import type { Inner } from "./inner";
    
    export interface Outer {
      inners: Inner[];
    }
    
==== a/inner.ts (0 errors) ====
    import type { Mid } from "./leaf";
    
    export interface Inner {
      mids: Mid[];
    }
    
==== a/leaf.ts (0 errors) ====
    export interface Leaf {
      id: string;
    }
    
    export interface Mid {
      leaves: Leaf[];
    }
    
==== b/outer.ts (0 errors) ====
    import type { Inner } from "./inner";
    
    export interface Outer {
      inners: Inner[];
    }
    
==== b/inner.ts (0 errors) ====
    import type { Mid } from "./leaf";
    
    export interface Inner {
      mids: Mid[];
    }
    
==== b/leaf.ts (0 errors) ====
    export interface Leaf {
    }
    
    export interface Mid {
      leaves: Leaf[];
    }
